Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "HEROBOTIX-0400" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Herobotix.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
As the released game is not completable, the following bytes were patched according to the fix kindly provided by mikroman:
$5695: 42 42 42 $569D: 26 1A 26 $56A4: 04 02 02 02 $56AD: 25 27 27 $56B6: 38 38 $56D4: 22 $56DC: 02 05 $56E4: 27 $56EC: 47 $9C8C: 4C 1D $9DBC: 13
